name: B&G Auto Sales
description_short: B&G Auto Sales is a buy-here-pay-here used car dealership operating across Arizona with in-house financing for customers with good or bad credit.
description_long:
B&G Auto Sales is a multi-location used car dealership based in Arizona with operations in Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, and Flagstaff. The company specializes in providing vehicle financing directly to consumers, positioning itself as an alternative for drivers who may have difficulty obtaining traditional auto loans due to credit challenges. The business model centers on making car ownership accessible through flexible, in-house financing rather than relying on third-party lenders.

B&G offers used vehicles ranging from 2015 to 2019 model years with advertised down payments as low as 6% and promotional "drive away" pricing starting at $301. They provide pre-approval services, trade-in valuations, and an online payment portal for account management. The company emphasizes a full-service approach, including professional vehicle inspection and repair before sale, backed by a 3-year/36,000-mile limited warranty on vehicles sold. Their financing terms are disclosed at 26.99% interest over a 44-month standard term.

B&G differentiates itself through multiple physical locations across Arizona, reducing geographic friction for customers, and their commitment to in-house financing that doesn't require external bank approval. They also accept trade-ins regardless of whether customers purchase from their inventory. The company operates under the parent entity Desert Finance LLC and maintains an online pre-approval system to streamline the application process.

The primary caveat is the notably high interest rate of 26.99%, which is substantially above conventional auto loan rates. While this reflects the higher-risk lending profile of buy-here-pay-here dealers serving subprime borrowers, it means total loan costs are significantly elevated. The 44-month terms and low down payments, while accessible, result in extended payment obligations for vehicles with higher mileage and age.
pros: In-house financing available for customers with good or bad credit without third-party lender approval
Multiple Arizona locations (Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, Flagstaff) provide geographic accessibility
Low down payments starting at 6% make initial purchase barriers minimal
3-year/36,000-mile limited warranty on all vehicles sold provides some consumer protection
Professional vehicle inspection and repair prior to sale ensures basic quality standards
Trade-in program accepts vehicles regardless of purchase decision
Online pre-approval system and payment portal for convenience
cons: 26.99% interest rate is substantially higher than conventional auto loans and even typical subprime rates
44-month financing terms mean extended obligation periods and total interest costs exceed vehicle values
Vehicle inventory consists of older used cars (2015-2019) with significant mileage (84K-130K+ miles)
Limited warranty is 3 years/36,000 miles, which may be insufficient given vehicle age and mileage
No transparency on approval rates, actual payment amounts, or default/repossession policies displayed on website
best_for: Subprime borrowers with poor or no credit history unable to obtain traditional auto financing
Arizona residents needing immediate vehicle access with minimal upfront capital
Drivers in multi-location areas (Phoenix, Tucson, Mesa, Flagstaff) seeking convenient in-person dealership service
Trade-in sellers looking to liquidate vehicles quickly regardless of separate purchase intent
diagnosis: B&G Auto Sales is best for subprime borrowers in Arizona who lack access to traditional auto financing and prioritize immediate vehicle access over cost optimization. The critical caveat is the 26.99% interest rate substantially increases total borrowing costs; a $15,000 vehicle financed at this rate over 44 months results in approximately $8,000+ in interest charges, making it essential that consumers understand the long-term financial commitment before proceeding.
services: In-house auto financing with flexible terms
Used vehicle sales across multiple Arizona locations
Professional vehicle inspection and repair services
Financing for customers with good or bad credit
Low down payment options (6% minimum advertised)
